name: SIMON PROPERTY GROUP INC.
summary: Simon Property Group, Inc. is an Indiana-based self-administered REIT that owns, develops, and manages premier shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use destinations. As of December 31, 2025, it owned or held interests in 212 U.S. income-producing properties including 108 malls, 70 Premium Outlets, and 16 Mills across 38 states and Puerto Rico, plus 42 international properties. It also holds a 22.2% equity stake in Klépierre SA and investments in retail operations, e-commerce, and real estate management.

products.name: Malls
products.description: 108 enclosed shopping mall properties across the United States.

products.name: Premium Outlets
products.description: 70 Premium Outlet shopping destinations in the United States.

products.name: The Mills
products.description: 16 Mills retail and entertainment destination properties in the United States.

products.name: Lifestyle Centers
products.description: Six lifestyle center retail properties in the United States.

products.name: shop.simon.com (Rue Gilt Groupe)
products.description: E-commerce venture operating under the RGG brand at shop.simon.com.

products.name: Commercial Paper Program
products.description: Global unsecured commercial paper program of $2.0 billion denominated in U.S. dollars, Euro and other currencies.

partnerships.description: Simon owns a 22.2% equity stake in this Paris-based publicly traded REIT owning shopping centers in 13 European countries.
Simon holds an investment interest in Jamestown, a global real estate investment and management company.
Simon holds an interest in this e-commerce venture operating shop.simon.com.
Simon holds an interest in Catalyst Brands LLC, a retail operations investment.
